ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the sample */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time the sample was collected */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the sample is stored */,
  "ethical_approval" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sample collection has ethical approval */,
  "processing_method" TEXT /* Method used to process the sample */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the sample */,
  "disease_state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease state associated with the sample */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient from whom the sample was collected */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who collected the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., tissue, blood) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_disease_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_state_id") REFERENCES disease_states ("disease_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., Hospital, Research Lab) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "institution_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliated institution or organization */,
  "source_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability rating of the source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_states" (
  "disease_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease state */,
  "disease_state_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease state */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases (ICD) code */,
  "disease_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the disease if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "patient_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "patient_age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "patient_ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "patient_medical_history" TEXT /* Summary of the patient's medical history */,
  "consent_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has given consent for data usage */,
  "patient_disease_state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease state of the patient */,
  "patient_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "researcher_email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "researcher_department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "researcher_title" TEXT /* Title of the researcher (e.g., Dr., Prof.) */,
  "researcher_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_proportions" (
  "proportion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell proportion record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the cell proportions belong to */,
  "b_cells" REAL /* Proportion of B cells */,
  "t_cells_cd4" REAL /* Proportion of T cells (CD4+) */,
  "t_cells_cd8" REAL /* Proportion of T cells (CD8+) */,
  "endothelial_cells" REAL /* Proportion of endothelial cells */,
  "fibroblasts" REAL /* Proportion of fibroblasts */,
  "macrophage" REAL /* Proportion of macrophages */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the proportions (e.g., percentage, fraction) */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the cell proportions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proportion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_proportions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., 'Temperature', 'pH') */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_metadata_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the annotation is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., comment, flag) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the result is for */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., statistical test, machine learning model) */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the analysis result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the analysis result */,
  "result_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
